display.purpose: Hero h1 only. One per page. Manrope 800, negative tracking.

title.purpose: Card titles, service names. Manrope 700 at smaller scale.

body.purpose: All reading copy. Inter 400. Max 65-75ch line length.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels, category tags, nav items. Inter 600 uppercase with wide tracking.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Card hover state only. Not applied at rest.

shadows.name: card-lifted
shadows.purpose: Active hover for service cards and CTA containers.

shadows.name: sticky-bar
shadows.purpose: Sticky mobile emergency bar. Upward shadow only.

shadows.name: header
shadows.purpose: Sticky header bottom edge. Very subtle.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus).

motion.name: hero-pulse
motion.purpose: Emergency CTA pulse in Hero section only. Disable with prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Emergency Button
components.description: Red CTA for emergency phone calls. Only used when the action triggers an immediate emergency response.
components.css: .ds-btn-emergency { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: #DC2626; color: #FAFAFA; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08); } .ds-btn-emergency:hover { background: #B91C1C; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.12); } .ds-btn-emergency:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1E3A8A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Trust Button
components.description: Navy CTA for scheduled appointments and informational actions. Never for emergency calls.
components.css: .ds-btn-trust { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; background: #1E3A8A; color: #FAFAFA; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-trust:hover { background: #1E40AF; } .ds-btn-trust:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #1E3A8A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Service overview card. Flat at rest, lifted border on hover. Icon top, title, body copy.
components.html:
💧

Water Damage

Pipe bursts, flooding, leaks — 60-minute response.
components.css: .ds-service-card { display: block; padding: 1.5rem; background: #FAFAFA; border: 1px solid #E4E4E7; border-radius: 1rem; text-decoration: none; color: #0A0A0A; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-service-card:hover { border-color: #1E3A8A; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.12), 0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-service-card__icon { font-size: 2.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .ds-service-card__title { font-family: Manrope, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-service-card__body { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #404040; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Small uppercase label that appears above major headings. Coastal Amber only.
components.html: 24/7 Emergency Response · 36 Years in South Florida
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #F59E0B; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: Sticky top header. Logo left, nav center (desktop), CTAs right. Collapses to hamburger on mobile.
components.html:
EnviroPro USA
ServicesAboutContact
Call 24/7
components.css: .ds-header { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; background: #FAFAFA; border-bottom: 1px solid #E4E4E7; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-header__inner { max-width: 80rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; } .ds-header__logo { font-family: Manrope, Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #1E3A8A; text-decoration: none; } .ds-header__logo span { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #404040; } .ds-header__nav { display: flex; gap: 1.75rem; } .ds-header__nav a { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #0A0A0A; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-header__nav a:hover { color: #1E3A8A; }

components.name: Testimonial Block
components.description: Customer quote card. White background, lifted shadow. Used in Why EnviroPro sections.
components.html:
EnviroPro responded within an hour after our pipe burst. Professional, bilingual, and worked directly with our insurance.

Mellissa Clark

Pinecrest, FL
components.css: .ds-testimonial { background: #FAFAFA; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.08), 0 4px 8px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.04); } .ds-testimonial__quote { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-style: italic; color: #0A0A0A; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0 0 1rem 0; } .ds-testimonial__name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0A0A0A; margin: 0 0 0.25rem 0; } .ds-testimonial__location { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #404040; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
Like a contractor who shows up on time, names a fair price, and does exactly what they said they would. The EnviroPro design system doesn't perform credibility — it communicates capability. Every visual decision earns its place the same way a skilled tradesperson earns trust: by being clear, precise, and dependable under pressure.

The palette is built around two primary signals: navy for authority and permanence, red for immediate action. The coastal amber appears rarely — only where credentials need a visual marker. Its rarity is load-bearing; when amber appears, it means something.

This system explicitly rejects the HomeAdvisor/Angi contractor template aesthetic: stock photos of smiling workers in hard hats, orange-yellow CTA gradients, 'Get Free Quotes' hero sections, and stacked trust-badge rows.
keyCharacteristics: Two-button language: red = call now (emergency), navy = schedule or learn more (considered)
Manrope at display and headline scale for authoritative, tight-tracked headings
Inter for body copy — warm, legible, never clinical
Cards with zinc borders, not floating shadows
Amber used at ≤5% of any surface; marks authority, not decoration
Section rhythm driven by generous vertical spacing

rules.name: The Two-Button Rule
rules.body: Red means call now. Navy means learn more or schedule. These two signals never swap roles, never share a color, and are never used decoratively.

rules.name: The Amber Rarity Rule
rules.body: Amber appears on ≤5% of any screen. If amber is appearing more frequently than navy, something is wrong with the layout's priority.

rules.name: The Single Display Rule
rules.body: One h1 per page, one instance of display-scale type. Section headings use Headline scale. This is what makes the hero headline actually feel like one.

rules.name: The Tracking Contract
rules.body: Negative letter-spacing belongs to Manrope at display and headline scale. Positive letter-spacing belongs to Inter labels at 0.08em+. No other combination.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces at rest have no box-shadow. A card's identity comes from its 1px zinc border and 1rem radius, not from floating above the page.

rules.name: The No Side-Stripe Rule
rules.body: Cards never use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent. Full border or nothing. A colored left-stripe signals budget template.

dos: Do use Emergency Red exclusively for call-to-action elements that trigger emergency response.
Do tightly track Manrope headings at -0.02em at display and headline scale.
Do separate sections with alternating background colors (Clean Canvas / Pale Surface) rather than dividers.
Do keep amber to eyebrow labels, star ratings, and certification markers.
Do write phone numbers as clickable tel: links with full e164 format.
Do ensure all text meets WCAG 2.1 AA contrast.
Do use prefers-reduced-motion to disable the hero pulse animation.
Do keep body line length at 65-75ch max.
donts: Don't use stock photos of smiling workers in hard hats, orange/yellow gradients, or 'Get Free Quotes' banners.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any card or callout.
Don't use glassmorphism — blur cards, frosted panels, or backdrop-filter decorations.
Don't add a third button variant.
Don't use Coastal Amber as a background color or for large text areas.
Don't apply positive letter-spacing to Manrope headings or negative letter-spacing to Inter body.
Don't replace real testimonials with placeholder or fabricated quotes.
